prompt: In the context of structure-based drug design, optimize the thermostability of EPO (Cytokine) from Homo sapiens. detail a computational workflow for: (1) stability hotspot identification, (2) point mutation screening using FoldX or Rosetta, (3) combinatorial variant prioritization. Describe the key steps and decision points in the workflow.
source_citation: Derived from open_targets (24.06); target: EPO; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0
